pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito version to a snapshot compatible with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions may fail to instrument classes or run tests on Java 17 due to module system restrictions or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin version to a snapshot compatible with the new build environment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not fully support the release flag or Java 17 specific compilation features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin version to a snapshot compatible with the new build environment.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may have issues running tests on Java 17 or with newer JUnit versions.
